name: kmu-sw-navigator
description: 국민대학교 소프트웨어융합대학 학생을 위한 개인화 RAG 기반 AI 내비게이터

scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.test:backend: cd backend && uv run python -m pytest
scripts.lint:backend: cd backend && uv run python -m ruff check .
scripts.wiki:build: cd backend && uv run python -m app.scripts.build_wiki --raw-dir ../data/raw --wiki-dir ../data/wiki
scripts.rag:ingest:dry: cd backend && uv run python -m app.scripts.ingest_documents --raw-dir ../data/raw --wiki-dir ../data/wiki --dry-run
scripts.rag:ingest: cd backend && uv run python -m app.scripts.ingest_documents --raw-dir ../data/raw --wiki-dir ../data/wiki
scripts.rag:ingest:embeddings: cd backend && uv run python -m app.scripts.ingest_documents --raw-dir ../data/raw --wiki-dir ../data/wiki --with-embeddings
scripts.rag:prepare-raw: cd backend && uv run python -m app.scripts.prepare_raw_document
scripts.env:check: cd backend && uv run python -m app.scripts.check_env --repo-root ..
scripts.env:check:strict: cd backend && uv run python -m app.scripts.check_env --repo-root .. --strict
scripts.live:smoke-plan: cd backend && uv run python -m app.scripts.live_smoke_plan --repo-root ..
scripts.live:smoke-run: cd backend && uv run python -m app.scripts.live_smoke_run
scripts.supabase:schema-check: cd backend && uv run python -m app.scripts.supabase_schema_check
scripts.supabase:create-smoke-user: cd backend && uv run python -m app.scripts.create_smoke_user
scripts.supabase:smoke: cd backend && uv run python -m app.scripts.supabase_smoke
scripts.supabase:auth-smoke: cd backend && uv run python -m app.scripts.auth_api_smoke
scripts.supabase:login-smoke: cd backend && uv run python -m app.scripts.supabase_login_smoke
scripts.supabase:llm-smoke: cd backend && uv run python -m app.scripts.llm_usage_smoke
scripts.google:calendar-smoke: cd backend && uv run python -m app.scripts.calendar_export_smoke
scripts.gemini:smoke: cd backend && uv run python -m app.scripts.gemini_smoke
scripts.gemini:answer-smoke: cd backend && uv run python -m app.scripts.gemini_answer_smoke
scripts.gemini:grounding-smoke: cd backend && uv run python -m app.scripts.gemini_grounding_smoke
scripts.verify:local: pnpm docs:check && pnpm wiki:build && pnpm rag:ingest:dry && pnpm submission:check && python -m pytest tests && pnpm test:backend && pnpm lint:backend && pnpm build:frontend
